---
title: "SIndexRCFS Wrappers"
author: "SIndexRCFS Contributors"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{SIndexRCFS Wrappers}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(SIndexRCFS)
```

# Introduction

This vignette demonstrates the convenience wrappers `HT2SI`, `SI2HT`, `SI2AGE`, and `SIY2BH`.

## Examples

```{r examples}
cat('HT2SI(1,50,1,30,0) =>', HT2SI(1,50,1,30,0), '\n')
cat('SI2HT(1,50,1,30) =>', SI2HT(1,50,1,30), '\n')
cat('SI2AGE(1,30,1,30) =>', SI2AGE(1,30,1,30), '\n')
cat('SIY2BH(1,30) =>', SIY2BH(1,30), '\n')
```
